name: TensorPM v1.12.3-beta.1 (Beta)
body:
# Changelog - v1.12.3-beta.1

## 🎉 New Features

### Connector setup feels clearer and more visual

TensorPM now makes connector selection easier to scan during setup and inside the app.

**What Changed:**

- ✅ **New connector logos** — Popular AI clients, email providers, MCP clients, and MCP servers now use dedicated brand or category icons.
- ✅ **Cleaner connector overview** — The setup overview has a tighter visual layout, clearer grouping, and more consistent empty states.
- ✅ **Improved Gmail setup guidance** — Email setup now explains the app-password path more clearly so users can connect Gmail with fewer dead ends.

### Chat attachments are easier to trust

Attachment handling in AI chat now behaves more predictably across sending, editing, and dashboard handoffs.

- ✅ **Attachment snapshots stay with sent messages** — Files attached to a message are preserved on the message itself instead of depending on the current composer state.
- ✅ **Edit and resend preserves attached files** — Resending an edited message keeps its original non-image attachments as well as image inputs.
- ✅ **Pinned attachments stay available** — Users can keep selected attachments available across messages when they intentionally pin them.

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

### More accurate AI request limits

- ✅ **Large image payloads no longer inflate local token estimates** — Image data is sent as vision input without counting the base64 payload as text.
- ✅ **Oversized requests are rejected before streaming** — Requests that exceed the model context window now fail early instead of continuing after a swallowed limiter error.
- ✅ **Queued AI requests remain usable after a rejection** — A failed request no longer poisons later valid requests waiting on the limiter.

## 🏗️ Improvements

### Better project and trail polish

- ✅ **Empty projects can start from a dashboard chat prompt** — After setup, users can begin shaping a project directly from the dashboard.
- ✅ **Decision trail entries render more clearly** — Persisted decision content now appears in a more structured, readable card layout.
- ✅ **Sandbox document libraries were refreshed** — Bundled document-processing libraries were regenerated for the current release candidate.

## 🧪 Testing

- ✅ Full non-E2E Vitest suite passed.
- ✅ TypeScript type checking passed.
- ✅ ESLint passed with existing warnings and no errors.
- ✅ Focused regression coverage was added for attachment resend behavior and rate limiter rejection handling.

## 📝 Notes

This beta focuses on connector setup polish, chat attachment reliability, and AI request safety. E2E tests were intentionally skipped for this patch beta release.

---

## 📅 Release Info

- **Version**: 1.12.3-beta.1
- **Release Date**: 2026-06-21
- **Previous Version**: 1.12.2-beta.1
- **Type**: Patch Beta Release
